top3.sql:
SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN fd.language = 'French' THEN 1 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage_french
FROM cards c
LEFT JOIN foreign_data fd ON c.uuid = fd.uuid
WHERE c.power IS NULL;

SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN fd.language = 'French' THEN 1 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage
FROM cards c
JOIN foreign_data fd ON c.id = fd.multiverseid
WHERE c.power IS NULL OR c.power = '';

SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN fd.language = 'French' THEN 1 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage_french
FROM cards c
LEFT JOIN foreign_data fd ON c.uuid = fd.uuid
WHERE c.power IS NULL;

SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN fd.language = 'French' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage
FROM cards c
LEFT JOIN foreign_data fd ON c.id = fd.multiverseid
WHERE c.power IS NULL OR c.power = '';

SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN fd.language = 'French' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage_french
FROM cards c
LEFT JOIN foreign_data fd ON c.uuid = fd.uuid
WHERE c.power IS NULL;

    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN fd.language = 'French' THEN 1 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage_french
FROM cards c
LEFT JOIN foreign_data fd ON c.uuid = fd.uuid
WHERE c.power IS NULL;

SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN fd.language = 'French' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage
FROM cards c
LEFT JOIN foreign_data fd ON c.id = fd.multiverseid
WHERE c.power IS NULL OR c.power = '';

SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN fd.language = 'French' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage_french
FROM cards c
LEFT JOIN foreign_data fd ON c.uuid = fd.uuid
WHERE c.power IS NULL;

final.sql:
SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN fd.language = 'French' THEN 1 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage_french
FROM cards c
LEFT JOIN foreign_data fd ON c.uuid = fd.uuid
WHERE c.power IS NULL;
